cases.description: Mixed Wreal Logic Select Driver: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Mixed Wreal Logic Select Driver: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
Mixed Wreal Logic Select Driver: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
